title: 让步状语从句 + 主句
sourceSentence: Although the proposal that the council approved in principle was designed to reduce costs, the incentives it created made agencies postpone maintenance until small issues became expensive failures.
chineseMeaning: 尽管委员会原则上批准的提案旨在降低成本，但它产生的激励措施导致机构推迟维护，直到小问题变成代价高昂的故障。
analysisScopeNote: 分析整个复合句，包含让步状语从句和主句。

chunks.text: the proposal that the council approved in principle
chunks.label: 主语（含定语从句）
chunks.note: 核心词proposal，后接that引导的定语从句修饰

chunks.label: 谓语
chunks.note: 被动语态，不定式表目的

chunks.label: 主语（含定语从句）
chunks.note: 核心词incentives，后接省略that的定语从句

chunks.label: 谓语
chunks.note: make + 宾语 + 省略to的不定式

chunks.text: until small issues became expensive failures
chunks.label: 时间状语从句

defaultCollectionItem.title: 让步状语从句
defaultCollectionItem.note: Although引导的让步状语从句，主句表示结果
